mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin (admin_id, password, admin_name, admin_email, admin_phone, admin_grade, last_login_ip) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{password}, #{adminName}, #{adminEmail}, #{adminPhone}, #{adminGrade}, #{lastLoginIp})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM admin ORDER BY admin_id
mapper.update:
UPDATE admin
admin_phone = #{adminPhone},
admin_email = #{adminEmail},
last_login = NOW(),
last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp},
WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
